# @platform/authorisation-runtime

Authorisation port interfaces for resource access (UMA/PEP pattern) and realm administration. Zero @platform dependencies — this is a leaf port node.

## Package identity

```text
Name: @platform/authorisation-runtime
Version: 0.1.0
Component: authorisation-runtime
Type: library
System: enterprise-react-platform
Domain: security
Bounded context: authorisation
Owner: team-platform
```

## Lifecycle

```text
Stage: active
Role: platform
Class: active.platform
Catalog lifecycle: production
Visibility: internal
Support level: standard
Review cadence: quarterly
```

## Ownership

```text
Owner: team-platform
Change control: owner-review
Promotion eligible: true
Semver policy: internal-traceable
```

## Responsibilities

- Define AuthorisationPort for UMA-based per-resource access decisions
- Define RealmAdminPort for tenant realm configuration (IdP, MFA, session, policies)
- Define all associated types: Resource, AccessDecision, IdentityProvider, MfaPolicy, SessionPolicy, ResourcePolicy
- Provide noop/stub implementations for testing

## Non-responsibilities

- Does not implement UMA ticket evaluation (owned by adapters-keycloak)
- Does not implement Keycloak Admin REST API calls (owned by adapters-keycloak)
- Does not hold any Keycloak credentials

## Public exports and usage

```text
Public exports only: true
Deep imports allowed: false
```

- Imported by platform-api to type-check the forward auth endpoint and auth settings API
- adapters-keycloak implements both AuthorisationPort and RealmAdminPort
